intro: A small, role-separated team stands behind the board. One group runs the day, one builds the models, one guards the quality, and one keeps you informed — each is a separate set of eyes so no single mistake slips through.

groups.name: Runs the day
groups.blurb: Keeps the work moving, decides what ships, and guards every human-facing page.

seats.does: Runs each work session — assigns the day's tasks, reviews the results, and deploys what's ready.
Sets priorities, keeps the to-do list deep and ordered, and makes sure two tasks never collide.

groups.name: Builds the models
groups.blurb: The people who turn raw box scores into ratings, projections, and game calls.

seats.does: Brings in and cleans every outside feed — scores, rosters, injuries — and keeps the identities straight across sources.
Owns the game-margin and team-strength models and the confidence ranges around each call.
Tests new ideas and methods against the record before any of them are allowed near the live product.

groups.name: Guards the quality
groups.blurb: Independent checks so a wrong number never reaches you.

seats.does: Re-derives every headline number from scratch before a task counts as done.
Hunts for shortcuts and corner-cutting, and turns every mistake into a permanent check.
Keeps the record straight — no duplicate work, no contradicting notes, one source of truth.

groups.name: Talks to you
groups.blurb: Turns the internal work into plain English and keeps the operation running around the clock.

seats.does: Writes every briefing and board line in plain language — no jargon reaches this screen.
Keeps the operation running around the clock, starting a fresh work session whenever one is needed.
Asks what each new capability unlocks that isn't obvious yet — the source of new ideas.

source: the operating structure behind the platform
